case_title: LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. THUX VALET COMPANY et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-16-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
